description: Composition Light yellow polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar and cuffs, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, rugged buttoned placket, printed branding on the left chest with appliqued detailing, brand tab appliqued on the right sleeve cuff, embroidered numbering on the left side seam flowing to the back, and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold separately using a mild detergent Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishement/embroidery Get ready for a clean sophisticated look in this light yellow polo neck t-shirt from lee. The appliqued branding on the left chest adds an element of interest, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.3&rdquo , Shoulders-19"
